title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!

analysis.drama_summary: 富家千金隱藏身份當清潔工，默默幫助未婚夫成為商界新貴，發現未婚夫出軌後華麗反擊，最終與真正愛她的霸道總裁結婚，完成身份逆襲與復仇。

structure.description: 第一幕建立女主隱忍身份（清潔工）與男主（霸道總裁）的初遇衝突，同時埋下女主真實身份的伏筆；第二幕揭露渣男出軌、女主決意復仇，與男主感情升溫；第三幕女主身份全面揭露，完成商業復仇與情感收穫的雙重高潮。雙線交錯指女主在「清潔工身份線」與「豪門千金真實身份線」之間切換，每次切換都帶來一次反轉爽點。
structure.act_breakdown: 第一幕（約30%）：女主以清潔工身份進入公司，與男主Hua Yuchen初遇衝突，展示專業能力（化妝品知識），揭穿毒面霜；第二幕（約40%）：發現未婚夫Yanjui出軌，偷聽錄音取證，婚禮上公開退婚，與男主感情升溫；第三幕（約30%）：身份全面揭露（顧家千金、尚奈國際大小姐），商業反擊（崇慶國際收購），毒面霜真相大白，反派伏法，盛大婚禮收尾。
structure.excerpt: A princess should be pampered and loved by all. / Sis, you hid your identity for 3 years just to chase Yanju and Shi. Tomorrow's your wedding. It's time to reclaim your golden status.

hooks.description: 開場即建立強烈的身份反差——女主是清潔工卻敢頂撞CEO，觀眾立刻好奇她為什麼有這個底氣，製造懸念讓人想看下去。標題本身就是最大的鉤子：清潔工頂撞CEO卻被求婚。
hooks.excerpt: Working as a janitor here is honestly way more interesting than being a prized employee at Shiang Nai International. / Stop pretending. Who needs your dirty money? I'm telling you, I'm a star employee at Shiang Nai International.

hooks.description: 女主明明是清潔工，卻擁有頂級化妝品專業知識，還能現場救人、即興化妝，暗示她身份不簡單。觀眾被勾起好奇心：她到底是誰？為什麼要隱藏身份？
hooks.excerpt: I'm trying to save her. The country's top shme medical cosmetics lab and you don't even know about lead poisoning. Do you guys even deserve to call yourselves dermacosmetic spec? / Most importantly, I have the guts to use it myself.

hooks.description: 女主在試婚紗時偷聽到未婚夫和小三的對話，得知自己被利用和嘲笑。這一場景瞬間翻轉觀眾情緒，從期待婚禮轉為憤怒和期待復仇。
hooks.excerpt: She's got a huge ego. Always putting on the show... I bet she got that wedding dress with an online loan or something. I can't stand people like her. too broke to act fancy but still try so hard. / Because she saved my grandma. My grandma made me get engaged to her. But now my grandma is gone. I can finally kick her out of my life.

hooks.description: 每一幕結尾都預告下一場更大的衝突——婚禮前夜的錄音、情敵Chumo的出現、毒面霜真相即將揭露，持續牽引觀眾。
hooks.excerpt: Yanju and Shei, if I expose your little affair right now, that would be letting you off too easy. I'm going to make you a laughingstock on your wedding day in front of the whole city.

characters.type_en: Hidden Heiress / Wolf in Sheep's Clothing Heroine
characters.description: 表面是清潔工，實則是頂級豪門千金和國際企業繼承人。擁有頂級專業能力卻甘願隱忍，為愛隱藏身份三年。核心吸引力在於反差萌和觀眾對「身份揭露那一刻」的強烈期待。
characters.excerpt: Working as a janitor here is honestly way more interesting than being a prized employee at Shiang Nai International. / She's the ays of Shiang Nai International. / A princess should be pampered and loved by all.

characters.description: 表面冷酷嚴厲，實則深情專一。一眼識破女主的不凡，敢於為她對抗所有人。佔有慾強但以愛為名。同時隱藏著自己也是世界第一財團掌門人的秘密。
characters.excerpt: Miss one, I'm afraid the one getting fired is actually you. / You're the only one I want. / I did it on purpose. If you ever try to get close to my wife again, I won't be so polite next time.

characters.description: 被女主幫助上位後忘恩負義，背地裡嫌棄女主身份低微，與小三暗通款曲。核心功能是成為女主復仇的對象，讓觀眾渴望看到他被打臉。
characters.excerpt: I can't stand people like her. too broke to act fancy but still try so hard. / Because she saved my grandma. My grandma made me get engaged to her. But now my grandma is gone. I can finally kick her out of my life.

characters.description: 自我標榜為男方未婚妻，自視甚高、欺凌女主。最終在女主身份揭露時崩潰。核心功能是製造女主被欺壓的情境，為後續打臉蓄力。
characters.excerpt: Bro, I'm the one who's your fiancée. Come on, just say it. / Like you actually deserve it. / Gun, stop deluding yourself. You want to marry into a rich family? You're not even in the league.

characters.type: 寵妹狂魔（三兄弟護妹團）
characters.description: 三位頂級企業CEO哥哥，對妹妹無條件寵溺和保護。功能是在女主被威脅時瞬間展現家族力量，給觀眾安全感和爽感。
characters.excerpt: Didn't we say be Loki? Be low key. / Our little sister. Nobody gets to bully her either. / We've finally found someone who loves Nyen more than we do.

character_combos.type: 霸總×隱藏千金（雙向隱瞞身份）
character_combos.type_en: Domineering CEO × Hidden Heiress (Mutual Identity Concealment)
character_combos.description: 男女主都隱藏了自己的真實身份——她隱藏豪門千金身份當清潔工，他隱藏世界第一財團掌門人身份。雙重隱瞞製造了層層反轉的化學反應，每揭露一層都是新的爽點。兩人棋逢對手又互相心疼。
character_combos.excerpt: You're the only one I want. / It's time to tell Shang Yian that I'm the one running Chongqing International. / Honey, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have hidden my real identity from you.

character_combos.type: 渣男×清潔工女主（恩將仇報）
character_combos.type_en: Scumbag Ex × Disguised Heroine (Betrayal of Kindness)
character_combos.description: 女主為愛隱藏身份三年幫助渣男上位，渣男卻嫌棄她是清潔工並出軌。這個組合製造了觀眾最強烈的憤怒感和復仇期待。
character_combos.excerpt: Three whole years. I went from being someone who didn't even lift a finger to now my hands are covered in cuts and scars. Jerk. How could you do this to me. / She pretended to be a cleaning lady to help him become Jing B's new king.

character_combos.type: 情敵三角（備胎竹馬×霸總丈夫）
character_combos.type_en: Love Triangle (Childhood Friend Rival × CEO Husband)
character_combos.description: 青梅竹馬Chumo回國後追求女主，引發霸總丈夫的醋意大爆發。製造甜蜜與緊張並存的戲劇效果，讓觀眾看到男主的佔有慾和深情。
character_combos.excerpt: I've been into Goun for 10 years. Why'd this older guy get to her first? / I just don't want to see you with him. / I did it on purpose. If you ever try to get close to my wife again, I won't be so polite next time.

settings.type: 公司辦公室/會議室對峙
settings.description: 權力不對等的空間裡，清潔工對抗高管和產品經理。職場等級制度讓女主的反抗更具戲劇張力——身份最低的人卻專業能力最強。
settings.excerpt: Employee handbook. Section 46. Employee attire must be appropriate. / I'm trying to save her. The country's top shme medical cosmetics lab and you don't even know about lead poisoning.

settings.description: 婚禮是短劇最經典的高潮場景——眾目睽睽之下退婚，將私人衝突公開化，最大化羞辱效果和觀眾爽感。所有人物齊聚，真相與身份同時揭露。
settings.excerpt: Do you take Miss Goo to be your wife? I do. All right, Miss Goo, do you take Mr. Yen as your husband? I don't. / Today I'm going to bury my dead love.

settings.description: 私密空間裡的偷聽場景製造強烈的窺探感和情感衝擊。觀眾與女主同時得知真相，代入感極強。
settings.excerpt: The soundproofing here is pretty good. If you need to cry, just let it out. / Mr. Hu, I recorded everything. We have every reason to call off the engagement.

settings.description: 商業場合中的身份揭露讓反轉效果最大化——在全行業面前打臉反派，讓社會地位的翻轉具有公共見證性。
settings.excerpt: I want to formally introduce you all to my granddaughter-in-law and the future lady of the Hua family. She is Goian. / She's the ays of Shiang Nai International.

settings.description: 女主發現真相後的情感宣洩場景，為男女主的親密接觸創造合理契機。醉酒讓角色卸下防備，推動感情線。
settings.excerpt: Tonight's tab is on me, everyone. Cheers. / Three whole years... Jerk. How could you do this to me. / Gun, is this really how you're getting back at Yanju?

relationships.type: 隱藏身份的契約婚姻→真愛
relationships.type_en: Hidden Identity Marriage Turning Into True Love
relationships.description: 男女主各自隱藏真實身份，從初遇衝突到互相吸引，到結婚後才逐漸揭露彼此的真正背景。衝突核心在於信任——隱瞞是否等於欺騙？揭露後能否接受？
relationships.excerpt: Honey, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have hidden my real identity from you. / President Hua didn't tell you because he didn't want you to get dragged into the toxic face cream case. He said, 'You're a princess. You shouldn't have to worry about these things.'

relationships.type: 恩將仇報的假未婚夫妻
relationships.description: 女主救了渣男奶奶而被訂婚，她真心付出三年，渣男卻只是利用她等奶奶去世後拋棄。核心衝突是善良被辜負後的憤怒與復仇。
relationships.excerpt: Because she saved my grandma. My grandma made me get engaged to her. But now my grandma is gone. I can finally kick her out of my life. / Three whole years. I went from being someone who didn't even lift a finger to now my hands are covered in cuts and scars.

relationships.description: 三位哥哥對妹妹無條件寵溺，既是女主的底牌也是喜劇調劑。衝突來自兄妹之間「你太高調了」vs「我要保護你」的拉鋸。
relationships.excerpt: Didn't we say be Loki? Be low key. / Big Brother, does my dress look pretty? / Our little sister. Nobody gets to bully her either.

relationships.description: 暗戀女主十年的竹馬回國，利用商業手段試圖拆散女主夫妻。衝突核心是「我比他先認識你」vs「我才是她選的人」。
relationships.excerpt: I've been into Goun for 10 years. Why'd this older guy get to her first? / Yen Yen, he's just some smalltime company boss. He can't give you happiness. / My husband is none of your business.

payoffs.description: 在眾目睽睽的婚禮上說出「我不願意」，當場公開渣男出軌證據。觀眾積壓的憤怒在這一刻完全釋放——最公開的場合、最響亮的拒絕、最徹底的羞辱。
payoffs.excerpt: Do you take Mr. Yen as your husband? I don't. / Go, what are you doing? Are you out of your mind? / I want to call off the engagement.

payoffs.description: 所有嘲笑女主是「清潔工」的人，在得知她是顧家千金、尚奈國際大小姐、華家少奶奶時集體震驚。多層身份逐步揭露，每一層都是一次打臉，爽感層層疊加。
payoffs.excerpt: She's the ays of Shiang Nai International. / She's already Yuchen's wife. She's our family's granddaughter-in-law now. / They're already married. Me, I'm just pretty lowkey.

payoffs.description: 被嘲笑的清潔工當場展示頂級化妝品知識和化妝技術，讓所有專業人士啞口無言。用實力說話比身份揭露更有說服力。
payoffs.excerpt: I'm trying to save her. The country's top shme medical cosmetics lab and you don't even know about lead poisoning. / Most importantly, I have the guts to use it myself. / So, she's actually that beautiful.

payoffs.type: 毒面霜真相大白＋反派伏法
payoffs.type_en: Toxic Cream Truth Revealed + Villain Arrested
payoffs.description: 三年前陷害男主母親的毒面霜案真相被揭露，反派父女親口承認罪行被錄音，當場被警方帶走。因果報應讓觀眾獲得正義伸張的滿足感。
payoffs.excerpt: If you weren't so stupid, crying all the time about wanting to be the number two at Shang, would I have made the toxic face cream? Would I have framed Hu Chen's mom? / You're both suspected of financial crimes, framing others on purpose, and willful assault. You're coming with us. / Spend the rest of your life regretting this behind bars.

payoffs.type: 霸總深情告白＋全部身家轉讓
payoffs.type_en: CEO's Romantic Confession + Full Asset Transfer
payoffs.description: 男主將名下所有房產、信託基金、世界第一財團股份全部轉到女主名下，用極致的物質奉獻表達愛意。這是「霸總寵妻」的終極表達，滿足觀眾對理想愛情的幻想。
payoffs.excerpt: These are all the properties under my name. They've all been transferred to Gounen. / All the shares I own in the world's number one corporation, Chongqing Group, are now also in your name. / If my wife tells me to go east, I'll never go west.

payoffs.description: 竹馬Chumo發現自己一直針對的「小公司老闆」其實是崇慶國際的真正掌門人，當場被解僱並求饒。權力反轉帶來的爽感。
payoffs.excerpt: President Hoy is the head of Chunctioning Group. You messed with him. / No way. I can't lose this job. President Hua, I was blind and didn't recognize you. Please forgive me. / It's too late. Somebody drag him out.

pacing.tempo: 快節奏密集反轉，幾乎每2-3分鐘一個爽點或衝突
pacing.tension_curve: 開場中高張力（職場衝突＋身份反差）→ 短暫舒緩（兄妹互動、感情線鋪陳）→ 急劇攀升（偷聽出軌、婚禮退婚）→ 情感中場（酒吧買醉、男女主感情升溫）→ 持續攀升（情敵出現、商業危機）→ 終極爆發（身份全揭露、反派伏法）→ 甜蜜收尾（婚禮＋資產轉讓）
key_beats: 女主以清潔工身份頂撞CEO，展示反差
女主當場揭穿毒面霜，展示專業碾壓
三兄弟到場，首次暗示女主真實身份
試衣間偷聽渣男出軌對話，取得錄音
婚禮現場說「我不願意」，公開退婚
酒吧買醉後與男主過夜，感情線推進
男主揭露崇慶國際掌門人身份，碾壓情敵
品牌活動上女主身份全面揭露（顧家千金＋華家少奶奶＋尚奈國際大小姐）
毒面霜真相大白，反派父女被捕
男主轉讓全部身家，盛大婚禮收尾
pacing.excerpt: I want to call off the engagement. / She's the ays of Shiang Nai International. / Spend the rest of your life regretting this behind bars. / These are all the properties under my name. They've all been transferred to Gounen.

dialogues.description: 利用地位和權力威脅對方，語氣傲慢、言語中暗含碾壓。通常由反派或臨時反派發出，為後續被打臉蓄勢。
dialogues.emotional_function: 製造壓迫感，積蓄觀眾憤怒值
dialogues.excerpt: Goon. Chanel International is about to sign a billion dollar deal with me. When the time comes, ruining you will be as easy as squashing an ant. / Uncle Goo, don't refuse a toast only to be forced to drink. If I wanted to ruin your goo family, it would take me no time at all.

dialogues.type: 反擊型（以理服人＋身份碾壓）
dialogues.description: 面對嘲諷和威脅時的精準反擊，語言簡潔有力，往往伴隨身份或實力的揭露。給觀眾帶來即時爽感。
dialogues.emotional_function: 釋放爽感，觀眾情緒宣洩
dialogues.excerpt: I want to make money, but not at the cost of someone's life. When it comes to cosmetics, the number one thing is safety. Number two is actual results. / My husband is none of your business. / Who do you think you are? It'd be even easier to crush your whole family.

dialogues.description: 男主用霸道但深情的方式表達愛意，佔有慾與柔情並存。讓觀眾感受到強烈的甜蜜和心動。
dialogues.emotional_function: 製造甜蜜感，滿足戀愛幻想
dialogues.excerpt: You're the only one I want. / If my wife tells me to go east, I'll never go west. / I know, babe. It's just because I care about you too much. / Honey, you're the one in charge of Chongchin Group. Of course, you're also the one steering my life.

dialogues.description: 在關鍵時刻拋出隱藏的真相，瞬間翻轉局勢。語言直白、衝擊力強，往往讓全場震驚。
dialogues.emotional_function: 製造震撼，推動劇情高潮
dialogues.excerpt: My mother created products always putting people first. The real culprits behind the toxic face cream case were the E family, father and daughter. / She's already Yuchen's wife. She's our family's granddaughter-in-law now.

dialogues.description: 以身份地位嘲笑女主，語氣輕蔑。功能是讓觀眾對反派產生厭惡，為女主的逆襲蓄力。嘲諷越狠，打臉越爽。
dialogues.emotional_function: 積蓄觀眾憤怒，為打臉蓄力
dialogues.excerpt: You're just a lousy janitor. What do you know? Don't even talk about making products. / Gun, stop deluding yourself. You want to marry into a rich family? You're not even in the league. / Turns out she's supposedly so ugly she's afraid to show her face.

visual_scenes.description: 盛大婚禮場景中，女主華麗現身（此前被傳「太醜不敢見人」），在全城矚目下說出「我不願意」。極致的視覺反差——最美的新娘做出最決絕的拒絕。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 全場注視下的公開反叛，私人情感與公眾場合的碰撞，美麗外表與決絕態度的反差
visual_scenes.excerpt: That janitor, she looks like a movie star. Even prettier than this one. / Do you take Mr. Yen as your husband? I don't.

visual_scenes.type: 清潔工即興化妝驚艷全場
visual_scenes.description: 被所有人看不起的清潔工當場展示化妝技術，妝後驚艷全場。視覺上從灰撲撲的清潔工變為光彩照人的美女，製造最直接的視覺衝擊。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 身份與能力的極致反差，從被嘲笑到被驚嘆的一百八十度轉變
visual_scenes.excerpt: Wow, that's amazing. / So, she's actually that beautiful. / She looks gorgeous. / Her skin is so smooth.

visual_scenes.type_en: Three Brothers Grand Entrance to Protect Sister
visual_scenes.description: 三位CEO兄長高調現身（與女主「要低調」的叮囑形成反差），展示頂級豪門氣場。視覺上製造「小公主被全世界最強後盾包圍」的畫面。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 低調身份與高調保護的反差，旁人從看不起到震驚的轉變
visual_scenes.excerpt: There they are. The three young masters of the Goo family. / A princess should be pampered and loved by all. / Didn't we say be Loki? Be low key.

visual_scenes.description: 在全行業矚目的品牌發布會上，女主作為華家少奶奶正式亮相。奢華場景中的身份翻轉讓視覺和情節雙重衝擊達到頂峰。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 公眾場合中多重身份的集中揭露，反派在眾目睽睽下崩潰
visual_scenes.excerpt: I want to formally introduce you all to my granddaughter-in-law and the future lady of the Hua family. She is Goian. / Now Miss Yi is really the clown here.

ending_hooks.type: 情感衝擊型＋懸念型（雙重身份揭露預告）
ending_hooks.description: 每一幕結束時都留下更大的懸念——女主身份還有更多層未揭露，男主也隱藏著秘密。觀眾被迫繼續觀看以獲得完整的真相。
ending_hooks.timing: 各段落結尾的最後一句台詞
ending_hooks.excerpt: It's time to tell Shang Yian that I'm the one running Chongqing International. / Yen Yen, we'll be seeing each other again real soon.

ending_hooks.type: 甜蜜收束型（大團圓婚禮）
ending_hooks.description: 全劇以盛大婚禮和深情誓言結尾，所有矛盾解決、反派伏法、身份揭露完成。給觀眾完整的情感閉環和滿足感，同時男主跪地求原諒和全部身家轉讓製造最後的甜蜜高潮。
ending_hooks.excerpt: No matter if life brings success or temporary setbacks, happiness or sadness, are you both willing to stand by each other's side, to support, to accompany, to share each moment and spend your lives together? I do.

tension_actions.description: 男主命令下屬拆掉女主辛苦佈置的裝飾品並踩踏，展示權力碾壓。這個行為直接否定了女主的勞動成果，激發觀眾同情心和憤怒。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 精心佈置的物品被暴力拆除踩踏，視覺上的破壞感強烈
tension_actions.excerpt: Take all of this down now. / Step on everything that's on the floor. / I just finished setting all this up. How dare you mess up all my hard work after an entire afternoon.

tension_actions.type_en: Throwing Money / Tossing Card as Humiliation
tension_actions.description: 用金錢羞辱對方，暗示對方可以被收買。被拒絕後反而凸顯女主的骨氣和自尊。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 銀行卡或現金被扔出/甩回的動作，象徵性地拒絕被金錢定義
tension_actions.excerpt: There's 200,000 in the card. That's enough to cover your compensation. / Stop pretending. Who needs your dirty money? / Take your filthy money. I don't need it.

tension_actions.description: 霸道總裁放下所有驕傲當場下跪，極致的反差萌——最有權力的人做出最卑微的姿態，因為愛。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 高大威嚴的男主突然跪地，權力關係瞬間反轉的視覺衝擊
tension_actions.excerpt: Otherwise, I'll kneel here and not get up. As long as you don't forgive me for a day, I'll kneel for a day. If you won't forgive me for a year, I'll kneel for a year. / You dummy. Who told you to kneel that long? Don't wear out our floors.

tension_actions.description: 反派在絕望中衝向女主試圖傷害她，被男主和兄長們攔下。瞬間的暴力危機製造緊張感，保護行為凸顯男主和兄長的守護角色。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 突然的暴力動作打破場面平靜，多人護妻/護妹的畫面震撼
tension_actions.excerpt: Gunan, I'm going to kill you. / My wife. No one gets to mess with her. / Our little sister. Nobody gets to bully her either.

genres.description: 以現代都市為背景，涉及企業商戰、職場關係、豪門恩怨。核心吸引力在於奢華生活方式的展示和現代職場權力鬥爭的戲劇性。
以頂級富豪家族為核心，涉及家族企業、聯姻、財產繼承等主題。吸引力在於滿足觀眾對上流社會的想像和窺探慾。
以企業間的競爭、收購、投資為劇情推動力。商業衝突為感情線提供舞台和籌碼，讓愛情故事有了更宏大的格局。

styles.description: 核心調性是「打臉—爽感—再打臉」的循環。女主被看不起→展示實力→身份揭露→全場震驚。節奏快、爽點密、情緒波動大。觀眾追求的是壓抑後釋放的快感。
霸總對女主的極致寵溺貫穿全劇——吃醋、護妻、下跪道歉、轉讓全部身家。讓觀眾在復仇爽感之餘獲得甜蜜的戀愛幻想滿足。
從發現背叛到精心佈局、公開退婚、揭露真相、反派伏法，完成一條完整的復仇弧線。滿足觀眾對「壞人必須受到懲罰」的心理需求。

analysis.title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
